description: An employee needs to swap shifts with a coworker.

nodes.task_description: The employee submits a shift swap request through the scheduling app, indicating which coworker has agreed to the swap.

expected_outcome.value: The request is submitted in the system.

nodes.task_description: The system sends a notification to the manager for approval.
The manager reviews the request, ensures it doesn't cause overtime, and approves it.

expected_outcome.value: The manager approves the swap, and the schedule is automatically updated.
